title: Green Habitats Weed Wand
features: No toxic chemicals, Intense heat destroys weeds and it's roots ensuring they never grow back
Leaves your garden weed free with minimal effort. Environmentally friendly. Kills weeds permanently so they don't grow back. All you do is apply a quick blast of heat to the weeds
Easy and safe operation. Unique cylinder locking to prevent leakage. Ergonomic handle design. Environmentally friendly. No hazardous chemicals. Cordless. Lightweight
Adjustable flame, economical to use. Heat blast permanently destroys plant cell structure. Ideal for de-icing pavements, de-freezing brass water pipes and lighting BBQ grills
